title: Rapunzel: A Princess Frozen in Time
original_title: Rapunzel: A Princess Frozen in Time
overview: In this modern adaptation of Rapunzel, a young girl who has lived her entire life in a room catered by her mother, the infamous scientist Dr. Gothen, must come to terms with her reality in order to expand her horizons.
